tools_used: web fetch (attempted; supremecourt.gov and courtlistener.com pages returned 403/empty)
helpful: Provisioned petition text included the full Fifth Circuit opinion in the appendix — no separate retrieval needed for the decision below
BIO's citations to post-petition developments (Hemani decided, companion denials) were the key leads; MCP + corpus verified them
Corpus rows carry date_cert_denied/docket_number, which let me confirm companion-case denials that CourtListener's docket-entries endpoint (RECAP-only) cannot show
gaps: No direct docket-number lookup in fedcourts query — finding a specific SCOTUS companion case means scanning ranked rows and filtering client-side (Doucet, No. 25-1001, never surfaced in 300 rows)

SCOTUS docket entries are not reachable via the MCP server (docket-entries is RECAP-only) and supremecourt.gov JSON returns 403 to the web fetcher, so companion-docket order-list actions are hard to verify directly
Opinion search returned no snippets and cluster syllabus was empty, so confirming a holding required pulling the full 39-page opinion text
Committed statpack lacks the salience-band section the prompt describes; anchored on the disposition/circuit/relist/CVSG tables instead
notes: Two of the three companion denials cited in the BIO were independently verified (Mitchell 6/29/2026, Cockerham 6/8/2026); Doucet rests on the BIO's citation alone. Corpus service timed out once at limit=500; limit=300 succeeded.
